Power System & Grid Connection Advisory

Enabling BESS, Renewable & Large Load Connections in the National Electricity Market (NEM)

Discuss Your Project
Services
Specialised advisory for grid‑scale energy projects in Australia’s National Electricity Market.
1

Grid Connection Strategy

End‑to‑end support for connection applications, GPS negotiations and regulatory engagement with AEMO and Network Service Providers.

2

BESS & Inverter‑Based Resources

Expertise in system strength, EMT studies and stability performance for large‑scale battery and renewable energy projects.

3

Large Load & Industrial Connections

Advisory services for data centres, hydrogen plants and industrial loads, including system impact assessments and connection risk mitigation.

About Us
Trusted expertise from feasibility to commissioning

EcoGrid Advisory is led by a principal power system engineer with extensive experience in grid connection and power systems analysis across the Australian National Electricity Market. With a proven track record at ElectraNet and involvement in CIGRE working groups, we provide credible, independent advice to help developers navigate complex connection processes and technical requirements.

From feasibility studies through to commissioning, we act as your trusted partner, ensuring that your project meets regulatory standards, optimises performance and minimises risk.

Contact Us
Ready to discuss your project? Get in touch to learn how EcoGrid Advisory can assist with your grid connection and power system needs.
Email: info@ecogridadvisory.com.au
Phone: +61 4XX XXX XXX
Location: Melbourne, VIC, Australia

Alternatively, please send us a message using your preferred email client and we'll respond promptly to discuss your project.
